title: Figma to Website with AI
subtitle: Turn your Figma designs into fully functional websites using AI-powered export tools

modules.title: Figma for AI-Ready Design
lessons: How AI export tools read Figma files
Setting up Figma with correct auto-layout
Naming layers and components for AI compatibility
Using Figma variables for theming
Preparing assets: images, icons, and fonts
modules.mini_task: Open a Figma template and rename all layers using a clear naming convention

modules.title: AI Export Plugins and Tools
lessons: Overview: Anima, TeleportHQ, Builder.io, and Locofy
Exporting a Figma component to HTML/CSS with Anima
Using Builder.io to turn designs into React components
Reviewing and cleaning AI-generated code
Understanding when AI export works best
modules.mini_task: Export a hero section from Figma to HTML using an AI plugin

modules.title: Framer: Design to Live Website
lessons: Importing Figma frames into Framer
Using Framer AI to enhance and animate
Adding interactions without code
Setting up breakpoints for mobile
Publishing from Framer in one click
modules.mini_task: Import a Figma frame into Framer and publish it as a live page

modules.title: Webflow with AI Assistance
lessons: Recreating a Figma design in Webflow
Using AI copywriting tools inside Webflow
Building a CMS for dynamic content
Connecting forms and interactions
SEO settings in Webflow
modules.mini_task: Build a 2-section page in Webflow matching a provided Figma screenshot

modules.title: Polish, Test, and Launch
lessons: Cross-browser testing your converted design
Fixing spacing and font rendering differences
Performance optimisation: image compression and lazy loading
Setting up a custom domain
Gathering client or stakeholder feedback
modules.mini_task: Publish your final website and share it with one person for feedback

final_project: Convert a complete 5-section Figma design into a live, responsive website using AI-powered export tools, with a working contact form and a custom domain.
